title: Update Data Table Display Name Request
description: Schema for curating the human-facing display name of a data table from the Data browser. Setting a value locks the label (provenance 'manual') so the form section's displayName field no longer overwrites it; null/empty resets it to the auto label derived from the form section.

displayName.description: Human-facing label. Null or empty resets the label to auto (re-derived from the owning form section).
